'''Presentian''' was a manufacturing company that specialized in the production of small personal conveyance devices. The company operated during the reign of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. They manufactured the [[PRP-100]] [[Jetpack/Legends|jetpack]].

{{Company-stub}}
